title: Add chart
description: Adds a new chart to the selected cell range.

title: Add comments and change cell colors in spreadsheet
description: Adds comments to the cells in the selection and can also change the background color of the cells.

title: Calculate World Bank indicator
description: Creates an asynchronous custom function to calculate a World Bank indicator value for a specific year.

title: Change cell background color
description: Sets the background color of the cell B3 to blue.

title: Change cell font color
description: Sets the font color of the cell B4 to red.

title: Change cell value
description: Changes the selected cell value.

title: Change background color
description: Sets blue color as the background of even indexed slides, if it is odd sets an image.

title: Check data mismatch
description: Highlights cells with data type mismatches based on column majority vote, starting from B2 by default, with configurable header offsets.

title: Complete address information
description: Completes the basic address data with detailed address information and inserts it into a spreadsheet.

title: Conditional formatting rules
description: Applies multiple conditional formatting rules to the selected range.

title: Convert formulas into values
description: Converts all formulas in the active worksheet into values.

title: Currency conversion
description: Converts a base currency into multiple desired target currencies.

title: Delete comments
description: Deletes comments from a specified range of cells in the active worksheet.

title: Find company logos
description: Searches for a company logo throughout the spreadsheet using the [Logo API](https://api-ninjas.com/api/logo) offered by [API Ninjas](https://api-ninjas.com).

title: Find invalid emails
description: Detects and highlights invalid email addresses within a specified column or across the entire spreadsheet.

title: Format range as table
description: Formats the range of cells A1:D10 as a table.

title: Hide or unhide rows and columns
description: Hides or unhides the specified rows and/or columns in the spreadsheet.

title: Highlight duplicates
description: Highlights duplicates in the selected area with different colors to recognize duplicated values quickly.

title: Remove extra spaces
description: Removes extra spaces from all text in all slides of a presentation.

title: Import CSV/TXT data
description: Imports data from remote CSV/TXT files into the spreadsheet.

title: Import hyperlinks
description: Imports hyperlinks between different worksheets in the spreadsheet.

title: Make cell font bold
description: Sets the font of the cell A2 to bold.

title: Merge cell range
description: Merges the selected cell range.

title: Next blank row
description: Finds the next available blank row in a worksheet.

title: Recalculate worksheet values
description: Repeatedly recalculates worksheet cell values within one-second intervals.

title: Remove duplicate sheet
description: Identifies and removes duplicate sheets in the spreadsheet.

title: Set column width
description: Sets the width for the column B.

title: Sheet merger
description: Merges data from all sheets into the active sheet by copying the used range of each sheet and appending it.

title: Sort range
description: Automatically sorts a selected range or the entire used range in a spreadsheet.

title: Split data sheets
description: Splits large sheets containing extensive datasets into multiple sheets if they exceed a specified row limit.

title: Sum of highlighted cells
description: Sums the answer of all highlighted cells in a spreadsheet.

title: Unhide all rows and columns
description: Unhides all the rows and columns in the active spreadsheet.

title: Unmerge all cells
description: Unmerges all the merged cells in the active worksheet.

title: Unmerge cell range
description: Unmerges the selected cell range.

title: Weighted average function
description: Creates a custom function to calculate a weighted average.

title: Write data to worksheet cell
description: Writes the data (the Hello world phrase) to the worksheet third column of the fourth row.
